creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mike,

Find attached to the bug report patches for version 3.2.0 of :

devel/simgear
games/flightgear-data
games/flightgear
games/flightgear-aircraft

Those build successfully on :

8.4 (i386/amd64)
9.3 (i386/amd64)
10.0 (i386/amd64)
11-CURRENT (tested on amd64 only)

Can you tell me if everything builds on your machine, and if the game runs correctly ?

Thanks,
Best regards,

Ganael.
